title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on Mogaveera Co-operative Bank Ltd., Mumbai
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated April 29, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹20,000/- (Rupees Twenty Thousand only) on Mogaveera Co-operative Bank Ltd., Mumbai (the bank) for non-compliance with certain directions issued by RBI on ‘Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy – Primary (Urban) Co-operative Banks (UCBs)’. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under the provisions of Section 47A(1)(c) read with Sections 46(4)(
